description_long: This is a classic Coca-Cola glass bottle featuring a festive holiday design with an image of Santa Claus on a red label wrapped around the midsection. The bottle has a contoured, hourglass shape with a narrow neck and a wider base, typical of vintage Coca-Cola bottles. The cap is red and appears to be a metal crown cap, matching the branding on the label. The glass is clear, allowing partial visibility of the interior, and the surface is smooth and glossy. The label is predominantly red with white Coca-Cola script and holiday-themed graphics. There are no visible signs of damage or wear, and the bottle appears empty.
description: A clear, contoured Coca-Cola glass bottle with a red holiday-themed label featuring Santa Claus and a red metal cap. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and appears empty.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo and part of the Santa Claus image on the red label.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full Santa Claus image on the label, with the Coca-Cola script partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the label's back, showing less branding and more of the bottle's clear glass surface.
description_view_3: Side view with Santa Claus's face partially visible and the Coca-Cola script wrapping around the label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red Coca-Cola label with white script and a holiday-themed image of Santa Claus, wrapping around the midsection of the bottle.
